verses.text: Issakhar' tapate: Tola, Puah, Jashub, leh Shimron, li pha uh hi

Tola' tapate: Uzzi, Refaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, leh Shemuel-te hi a, amau' beh sung panin innkuan lutangte hi a, Tola-te beh pen amau' khangin a galhangte ahi uh hi. David' hun laitakin mihing tul sawmnih leh tul nih leh za guk pha uh hi
Uzzi in tapa Izrahiah nei hi. Izrahiah leh a tapate Mikhael, Obadiah, Joel, leh Isshiah, mi nga hi a, a vekpi-in ukpite ahi uh hi

Amaute' banah a pate uh a innkuan kuanin khangsimna-ah a kiciamtehna tawh kizui-in galsim dingin galkap honte mi tul sawmthum leh tul guk om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in zi tampi nei-in ta tampi nei uh hi
Issakhar minam sungah a om, khangsimna-ah a kiciamteh, a galhang a thahat amau beh mi a vekpi-in tul sawmgiat leh tul sagih ahi hi.
Benjamin' tapate: Bela, Bekher, leh Jediael, thum pha uh hi

Bela' tapate: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth, leh Iri, nga pha uh a, amau' beh sungah innkuan lutang, a thahat galhangte ahi uh hi. Amau' khang simna a kiciamtehna-ah tul sawmnih leh tul nih leh sawmthumleli pha uh hi
Bekher' tapate: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth, leh Alemeth ahi uh hi
Hihte khempeuh Bekher' tapate ahi uh hi. Amau' khang tawh kizui-in a khang simna a kiciamtehna-ah, amau' beh sungah innkuan lutang, a thahat a galhang mihing tul sawmnih leh za nih ahi hi
Jediael' tapa pen Bilhan ahi hi. Bilhan' tapate: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Khenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish, leh Ahishar ahi uh hi
Hihte khempeuh amau' beh sungah innkuan lutang hi uh a, a thahat, a galhang, Jediael' suante gal simna-ah nasem dingin a baihsa-in a om mihing tul sawm leh tul sagih leh za nih pha uh hi
Tua ciangin Shuppim leh Huppim zong hih minamte sung mah hi a, Dan in Hushim kici tapa khat a nei hi.
Naftali' tapate: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer, leh Shallum hi a, Bilhah sung pana piangte ahi uh hi.
Manasseh' tapate: A zineu Aram numei tawh a neih Asriel leh Makhir ahi hi. Makhir pen Gilead' pa ahi hi
Tua ciangin Makhir in Huppim leh Shuppim-a' ding zi a la hi. Ama sanggamnu' min Maakah ahi hi. Makhir' tapa a nihna' min Zelofehad hi a, Zelofehad in tanu bek a nei hi
Tua ciangin Makhir' zi Maakah in tapa nih nei a, a min Peresh leh Sheresh ahi hi. Peresh' tapate Ulam leh Rakem ahi hi
Ulam' tapa Bedan ahi hi. Hihte pen Manasseh' tapa Makhir' tapa Gilead' suante ahi hi
Tua ciangin Gilead' sanggamnu Hammolekheth in Ishhod, Abiezer, leh Mahlah nei hi
Shemida' tapate Ahian, Shekhem, Likhi, leh Aniam ahi uh hi.
Efraim' suante: A tapa Shuthelah, a tapa Bered, a tapa Tahath, a tapa Eleadah, a tapa Tahath
a tapa Zabad, a tapa Shuthelah ahi hi. Efraim in tapa dang nih nei a, tuate Ezer leh Elead ahi uh hi. Gath khua mite' bawng a sut dingin a kuan lai-in Gath mite in amaute gel na that uh hi
Tua ciangin a pa uh Efraim ni tampi sung kap a, amah a hehnem dingin a sanggamte hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Efraim in a zi luppih a, amah gai-in tapa khat nei hi. Ama innsungah siatna tung ahih manin amah in a min Beriah a phuak hi
Ama tanu Sheerah hi a, Bethhoron nuainung leh a tungnung leh Uzzensheerah khua a lamnu ahi hi
Tua ciangin Refah kici tapa khat nei a, ama suante: Resef, a tapa Telah, a tapa Tahan
a tapa Ladan, a tapa Ammihud, a tapa Elishama
a tapa Nun, a tapa Joshua ahi hi
Amau' neihsa gam leh a ten'na uh Bethel leh a khuapite, leh nisuahna lamah Naaran, leh nitumna lamah Gezer leh a khuapite, Shekhem leh a khuapite, leh Azzah leh a khuapite ahi hi
Manasseh' suante in Bethshean leh a khuapite, Taanak leh a khuapite, Megiddo leh a khuapite, Dor leh a khuapite a uk uh hi. Hihte sungah Israel' tapa Josef' suante a teng uh hi.
Asher' tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, leh a sanggamnu uh Serah ahi hi
Beriah' tapate: Heber leh Malkhiel hi a, Malkhiel pen Birzaith khuapi a satpa ahi hi
Heber pen Jaflet, Shomer, Hotham, leh a sanggamnu uh Shua-te' pa ahi hi
Jaflet' tapate: Pasak, Bimhal, leh Ashvath ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Jaflet' tapate ahi uh hi
A sanggampa Shomer' tapate: Rohgah, Jehubbah, leh Aram ahi uh hi
A sanggampa Hotham' tapate: Zofah, Imna, Shelesh, leh Amal ahi uh hi
Zofah' suante: Suah, Harnefer, Shual, Beri, Imrah
Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran, leh Beera ahi uh hi
Jether' suante: Jefunneh, Pispa, leh Ara ahi uh hi
Ulla' suante: Arah, Hanniel, leh Rizia ahi uh hi
Hihte khempeuh Asher' beh lutangte, a kipakta, a thahat galhangte, ulian a ukte ahi uh hi. Gal sungah nasem dingin khangsimna-ah a kiciamteh amaute a phazah mihing tul sawmnih leh tul guk ahi hi.
